title: Risk Review Meeting — 2024-03-24
text:
# Risk Review Meeting — 2024-03-24

**Attendees:** Rowan Ellery, Felix Herrera, Sam Dreher, Lena Okafor

## Summary

This page covers the battery chemistry evaluation for the Payload subsystem. Key items discussed and actions agreed are recorded here.

## Actions

- Follow-up with Nina Schulz on outstanding items.
